text:

commit d3bae708f0a24ed4c113260873f4295616725068
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2024-01-23 07:38:43 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-01-25 17:17:35 +0000

    net-p2p/prowlarr: Update to 1.12.2.4211

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr/releases/tag/v1.12.2.4211

     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fix count in GGn fixture after allowing only torrents
     * Fixed: (GGn) Improve titles and allow only torrents
     * New: Optional directory setting for Aria2
     * Throw download as failed for invalid magnet links
     * Sort Custom Filters
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fix typo
     * Fixed: (FL) Improve error message for service unavailable
     * Bump Inno version to 6.2.2

    PR:             276539
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)
